top.title: More US Marines and warships to be moved to Middle East, reports say
top.summary: The reinforcements will come from an amphibious ready group that is usually based in Japan, an official told CBS, the BBC's US partner.

top.title: Los Angeles asks for investigation into LA28 Olympics chief over Epstein ties
top.summary: The LA city council voted unanimously for an investigation into LA28 chief Casey Wasserman over his Epstein ties.

top.title: Family of Michigan synagogue suspect killed in Lebanon airstrike, officials say
top.summary: The FBI said the suspect had large quantities of fireworks and petrol in his vehicle when it caught fire after ramming a synagogue on Thursday.

top.title: Games with loot boxes to get minimum 16 age rating across Europe
top.summary: The new changes by the Pan-European Game Information age-ratings body (PEGI) will start from June.

top.title: AI toys for children misread emotions and respond inappropriately, researchers warn
top.summary: In first study of its kind, Cambridge researchers found AI toys could misread some children's emotions.

top.title: Grammarly pulls AI author-impersonation tool after backlash
top.summary: Writers criticised the feature which used their names and styles as "AI personas" without consent.

title.#text: States’ anti-monopoly case against Live Nation continues Monday
Spotify tests letting users directly customize their Taste Profile
Microsoft’s Copilot AI assistant is coming to current-gen Xbox consoles this year
